summary: Gheras Phase 2 backend fully validated. 33/33 pytest cases passed covering: health v2, public (categories=8, story-options 5/4/5/3/3, settings), auth (admin+parent register/login), uploads (happy path + bearer + ?auth= query + cross-user 403 + no-auth 401 + admin override + wrong-ext + invalid-scope), drafts lifecycle, orders (create with enriched Arabic category/subcategory/context in ai_prompt_snapshot, draft cleared on create, summary list vs full detail, 404 for other user, characters>max rejected, invalid category rejected), admin orders (list with user_email, detail, 5 status transitions, prompt edit+prompt_edited=true, regenerate-prompt rebuilds and resets flag), admin story-options CRUD with is_hidden honored by public feed, admin content/settings/categories/subcategories/plans/users/prompts CRUD, RBAC 403 for non-admin on all /api/admin/*, and a global sweep confirming no MongoDB _id leaks in any JSON response.
critical_code_review_comments: storage.py: Emergent Object Storage session key is process-wide and never refreshed on 401/expiry — add retry-with-reinit on 4xx.
upload_routes.py: does not validate actual image magic bytes — only extension is checked; a user could upload a renamed binary as .png. Consider lightweight signature sniffing.

order_routes.py: characters cap is 3 from settings but Pydantic model CharacterPayload has no upper bound inside StoryData; the 400 is raised only after parsing — acceptable but consider Field(..., max_items=max_chars_cap).
draft_routes.py GET /drafts/current returns empty dict when no doc exists — ok, but the shape differs from persisted doc (missing updated_at); FE should handle both.
admin_routes.py /prompts/{pid} PATCH uses full PromptIn — field `key` is overwritable which can break unique-key invariant. Consider excluding key on update or validating uniqueness.
admin_routes.py categories PATCH replaces slug without uniqueness check (only POST checks) — potential duplicate slug on update.
prompt_engine.py hard-limits characters to 5 (`characters[:5]`) while settings allow more; should read from settings or use len().
No rate-limiting on /uploads/image — file upload endpoint is a DoS vector.
public_routes.py /public/content returns flat dict keyed by key — section info lost; FE may need section grouping later.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@gheras.com / Admin@1234 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Parents registered dynamically per run with unique suffix.
seed_data_creation: Tests register 2 unique parent users per run (parent_<run>@test.com, parent2_<run>@test.com). They create 1 real uploaded image in Emergent Object Storage and 2-3 orders. Admin story-option/category/plan/content/subcategory entries created and cleaned up within their tests. characters.max_count is reset to 3 at the end of its test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all Phase 2 endpoints. IMPORTANT: pytest must be invoked with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported from /app/frontend/.env (e.g. `export $(grep -v '^#' frontend/.env | xargs) && pytest ...`); otherwise BASE_URL is empty and every request throws MissingSchema. All tests idempotent via unique RUN_TAG; safe to re-run. Upload tests hit real Emergent Object Storage — requires EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env (confirmed live).
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions detected in this iteration.
